entry.title: [HYPE-0x01] ONWARDS TO GREATNESS!
entry.content:
0x00. Helloooo hackers!

(Yan’s voice is echoing in my head. Oh you want it too?)

As you’ve probably guessed, I’m a big pwn.college fan. I just love what they do, being all open source and stuff. They also stream the classes at ASU on twitch! (well, at least they used to… but the vods can be found on youtube) Watching Rob debug binaries with gdb at 3 am in my timezone never failed to amaze me. Peak. All the live classes and the lecture vids were peak. However, you see, I’m still a white belt :c

My excuse? I’m lazy, unmotivated yada yada yada…

Anyway, the reason I’m creating this website is… totaly different. With the rise of LLM written blogs, websites and everything, I didn’t just want to sit back and watch LLMs take over the internet. Because I love reading human written blogs. I love reading the excitement, fun and pain the author has gone through (and ofc the memes!!), looking at you A Journey To The Dawn, and I’m afraid we are slowly losing the fun of writing/reading/creating stuff as nowadays pretty much everything is done via prompts :(

So I wanted to stand against them by adding +1 to the human side, and I hope one day you will too (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶). If you’re a newbie starting into this field, just ignore/block/dodge the people who tells you to use AI, for learning or anything really, instead use your pretty brain please :p

Btw, I definitely suggest you to join pwn.college’s discord. Why you might ask? because of the memes! it’s always the memes and the legendary Rob info dumps x)

my fav in the #memes channel (made by @__cyx__)

Well, that’s it for now. One day I’ll get my blue belt and pose just like Yan but that day is neither today nor tomorrow, for a reason or another. In the meantime I’ll try to be the strongest white belt :) Alright, time’s up, that’s all from me. For now.

Shall we then?

0x01. Goodbyeee hackers!

both the audio are from this vidand no, it didn't take so much time finding the "perfect" one
